document_info.prepared_by: Patricia Nowak, Senior Broker, Steel City Insurance Group

business_description.nature_of_business: General contracting for commercial and institutional construction — healthcare facilities, educational buildings, and corporate offices throughout Western Pennsylvania

coverages_discussed.notes: Coverage for approximately 425 employees across all operations. Loss history: 35 claims, 1126509.37 paid, 1171607.20 incurred.
Occurrence form; includes standard premises/operations and products/completed operations. Loss history: 8 claims, 105420.70 paid, 176946.61 incurred.
15 vehicles including hired and non-owned auto. Loss history: 8 claims, 47076.38 paid, 99900.04 incurred.
All scheduled locations on a special form with replacement cost valuation. Loss history: 1 claim, 36750.00 paid, 36750.00 incurred.

positives: Formal return-to-work program has reduced lost-time claims by over 30%
Dedicated safety committee meets monthly and conducts quarterly site audits
Formal business continuity and disaster recovery plan tested annually
ISO 9001 certification reflecting commitment to quality and process control
Contractual risk transfer provisions in all subcontractor and vendor agreements
Background checks and MVR reviews conducted annually for all employees in safety-sensitive positions
Structured HR program with 425 employees, low turnover, and consistent safety training
42 years of continuous operations under consistent management demonstrating operational stability
concerns: 52 total claims with 1485203.85 total incurred over the review period warrants underwriting review
Account experienced a non-renewal in 2022-2023 with Zurich Insurance Group — reason: carrier book of business exit (carrier-initiated, not underwriting action)
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Over the review period, the insured incurred 52 total claims with 1315756.45 in total paid losses and 1485203.85 total incurred. Currently 18 claims remain open and 34 are closed. Annualized loss ratio is 18.7% based on avg annual incurred of 297040.77 against current annual premium of 1589164.70 over 5 loss years. Breakdown by line: Workers' Compensation — 35 claims, 1126509.37 paid, 1171607.20 incurred; General Liability — 8 claims, 105420.70 paid, 176946.61 incurred; Commercial Auto — 8 claims, 47076.38 paid, 99900.04 incurred; Commercial Property — 1 claim, 36750.00 paid, 36750.00 incurred.

extracted_text_sections.executive_summary: We are pleased to submit Keystone Commercial Builders, Inc. for your review and consideration. The insured is a general contracting for commercial and institutional construction — healthcare facilities, educational buildings, and corporate offices throughout Western Pennsylvania, headquartered in Pittsburgh, with approximately 42 years of operating history. Coverage is requested for Workers' Compensation, General Liability, Commercial Auto, Commercial Property.
extracted_text_sections.operations_description: General contracting for commercial and institutional construction — healthcare facilities, educational buildings, and corporate offices throughout Western Pennsylvania, headquartered in Pittsburgh. Approximately 42 years of operating history.
extracted_text_sections.safety_programs: The insured has implemented a formal return-to-work program that has reduced lost-time claims by over 30%. The insured maintains a dedicated safety committee that meets monthly and conducts quarterly site audits. Management has invested significantly in employee safety training, with all field personnel OSHA-certified. The insured maintains a formal business continuity and disaster recovery plan tested annually. The organization has achieved ISO 9001 certification. The insured carries contractual risk transfer provisions in all subcontractor and vendor agreements. Background checks and MVR reviews are conducted annually for all employees in safety-sensitive positions.
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: The claims history warrants review; management has implemented corrective measures to address identified exposures. Over the review period, the insured has incurred 52 total claims with 1315756.45 in total paid losses and 1485203.85 total incurred. Currently, 18 claims remain open and 34 have been closed. Annualized loss ratio is 18.7% (avg annual incurred 297040.77 against current annual premium 1589164.70 over 5 loss years). Note: account experienced a non-renewal in 2022-2023 with Zurich Insurance Group. Reason: Carrier non-renewed — book of business exit.
